entity.name: Mahendra Chavan
entity.description: Founder and maintainer of SyncLite, an open-source platform focused on making data synchronization simple, reliable, and vendor-neutral.

projects.name: SyncLite
projects.description: SyncLite is an open-source platform that makes edge-to-cloud data synchronization boring again. It enables developers to build offline-first, cloud-sync-ready applications with exactly-once data delivery, low-code APIs, and vendor-neutral replication into databases, data warehouses, and data lakes.

channels.description: Support the continued development of SyncLite through GitHub Sponsors.

plans.name: Community Support
plans.description: Help keep SyncLite free, open source, and vendor-neutral by supporting ongoing maintenance, documentation, testing, and community engagement.

plans.name: Sustaining Development
plans.description: Support full-time development of new connectors, the Open Replication Format, platform compatibility, testing infrastructure, documentation, and long-term maintenance.
